phases.name: Phase 0: Land loose BE files (main tree)
phases.note: spec/plan/status committed (0af79625); loadtest-profile + exception-test commit skipped by user — files remain uncommitted in main tree

phases.name: Phase 2: SSE characterization tests
phases.note: 4 test classes, 30 tests; discovered: heartbeat intervals differ (10s/15s, offset by design), cap=FIFO eviction not rejection

phases.name: Phase 3: SSE base extraction
phases.note: AbstractSseService<K>; logging+@Scheduled+cap kept subclass-side; dispatch send-loops deliberately not extracted (not cross-service dup)

phases.name: Phase 4: Consolidation batch — adopt existing primitives
phases.note: 7/7 items; +2 forced one-line constructor fixes in tests (reported); duplicated predicate found at 3 sites not 2

phases.name: Phase 5: Entity transitions
phases.note: 6 transitions + applyRequestFields dedup (parameterized: blocks were behaviorally divergent); 1 adjudicated test change (times(2) save was structural, not behavioral)

phases.name: Phase 6: Wire-pinning tests — moderation + admin
phases.note: 36 tests/12 endpoints; AdminController was fully uncovered (existing test covered AdminModerationController); privacy pins (usernameSuffix, no userId) executable; admin deliberately inverts (userId present)

phases.name: Phase 7: Records migration
phases.note: all 51 DTOs are records; 4 batches, agent died after batch 3 (session limit) resumed cleanly; zero @Data, zero jsonPath assertion edits; PublicPlannerResponse uses @Builder(toBuilder=true) for setCommentCount build-final; no @JsonProperty needed

phases.name: Phase 8: DI sweep + lombok.config
phases.note: 23 converted + 15 justified skips (@Value/logic/multi-ctor); lombok.config addLombokGeneratedAnnotation; jacoco gate green (INV8); field-order verified safe for all 23

phases.name: Phase 9: Entity @Data removal + setter lockdown
phases.note: 4 entities @Data->@Getter; ZERO step-A rewrites needed (all equality observers were ref-match or id/primitive); INV7 8/9 locked; takenDownAt setter kept for a PROVABLY DEAD guard (PlannerCommandService capture/restore no-op) -> FOLLOWUP: delete guard, then drop setter to close INV7

phases.name: Phase 10: Planner test split + Thread.sleep fixes
phases.note: 66 tests moved + 7 reverse-map gaps filled = 73; PlannerServiceTest deleted; JwtTokenService Clock seam (2-arg pkg ctor); 5 sleeps gone (parkNanos for the deadlock-backoff site, correctly not an ordering sleep); 993 tests green

phases.name: Phase 11: Mass sweeps — test rename + factory adoption
phases.note: 281 names renamed/48 files (audit's 304 was stale); regex ^[a-z][A-Za-z0-9]*(_[A-Za-z0-9]+){2,}$ +exclude ^test[A-Z] carried to phase 13; 5 factory swaps (rest justified hand-rolls: unsaved-id mockito fixtures, constraint fixtures); 993 tests unchanged

phases.name: Phase 12: Controller split
phases.note: 7 controllers (5 mirror service seams + residual config-only + PlannerSseController); URL inventory diff EMPTY; PlannerControllerTest 74/74 unchanged; FOLLOWUP: /api/planner/md/events looks like a legacy dup of /api/sse/subscribe

phases.name: Phase 13: Static-analysis ratchet
phases.note: check green, zero suppressions, CI runs check, regex byte-exact. Checkstyle (IllegalImport lombok.Data ban + UnusedImports, fixed 31 dead imports) + service-Javadoc gate + CPD(threshold 120, main-only) + Error Prone(ERROR-level, 1 fix). MethodName moved Checkstyle->ArchUnit (TestNamingConventionTest) since Checkstyle can't scope to @Testable. DEFERRALS (follow-up, non-blocking): import-order+star-imports NOT enforced (18 main+11 test star imports, broad order violations); Error Prone 85 WARN findings (JavaUtilDate x81 etc) advisory only. cpd 3.5 warns on future Gradle 10.

phases.name: Phase 14: Package-by-feature (main session)
phases.note: 8 features (admin/auth/comment/moderation/notification/planner/shared/user), 226 renames, all old layer pkgs vacated, 994 tests green, INV4 clean, ArchUnit layer matchers intact. HANDOFF for p15: (1) AbstractSseService widened to public -> add comment->shared.sse edge; (2) InternalController->planner/controller, planner->planner.validation edge; (3) import-order/unused-import hygiene pass needed (auto-inserts after package line) - checkstyle will flag; (4) stale javadoc @link/@see to old paths (>=4) fix in doc-sync.

phases.name: Phase 15: Boundaries, index hygiene, doc truth-sync
